home.title_seo: Medpro - Fast appointment booking at 100+ hospitals and 1000+ clinics
home.description_seo: A digital healthcare platform trusted by 4 million users, 100+ hospitals and 1000+ clinics. Comprehensive appointment booking via hotline 19002115, web, app and social networks.
home.title: Home

intro_section.title: Connecting people with healthcare facilities and services
intro_section.description: Quick booking - Online queue number - Remote health consultation

blog_section.title: Quick appointment booking
blog_section.description: Provides online healthcare appointment booking services at leading hospitals in Vietnam such as University Medical Center HCMC, Cho Ray Hospital, and Children's Hospital, allowing users to choose services and doctors based on their needs.

blogs.title: Because your time is valuable
blogs.description: Patients can proactively choose appointment information (date and time)

blogs.title: Caring for every family's health
blogs.description: Patients will receive an online medical ticket directly on the application

blogs.title: Bringing healthcare closer
blogs.description: Users can select and make payments directly on the platform

medical_facilities_section.title: Featured hospitals
medical_facilities_section.description: Book appointments with more than {{count}} medical facilities nationwide

hero_section.title: Quick booking - Get queue number online
hero_section.description: Patients can proactively choose appointment information (date, time, and medical facility). Patients will receive their queue number directly on the platform.

items.title: Get queue numbers online quickly
items.description:
Register for medical checkups / follow-ups by date.
Register by medical specialty.
Follow-up appointments

items.title: Remote medical consultation
items.description: Online healthcare consultation with video calls from doctors

items.title: Hospital fee payment
items.description: Multiple online payment methods. Supports popular e-wallets

items.title: Home healthcare services
items.description: Professional home healthcare services (nursing, testing) to meet common home health needs

items.title: Partner healthcare network
items.description: Network connecting hospitals, clinics, and medical facilities nationwide

about.title_seo: About Medpro - The most widely used healthcare application
about.description_seo: Learn about Medpro, a pioneering application connecting users with healthcare services. Simplifying access to medical care and health consultations.
about.title: About
about.description: This application helps patients and their relatives register for hospital appointments online anytime, anywhere without needing to visit the hospital directly.

login.description_seo: Log in to Medpro to quickly book appointments at 100+ hospitals and reputable clinics. Easily manage appointments and medical records.
